name: bin-alzain
description: Bin Al-Zain Coffee Shop — Arabic e-commerce (React + Express + PostgreSQL)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "cyan,green" --kill-others-on-fail "PORT=4000 pnpm --filter bin-alzain-backend dev" "PORT=3000 BACKEND_PORT=4000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter bin-alzain-frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter bin-alzain-backend build && pnpm --filter bin-alzain-frontend build
scripts.start: concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "cyan,green" --kill-others-on-fail "PORT=4000 pnpm --filter bin-alzain-backend start" "pnpm --filter bin-alzain-frontend preview"
